interactions.rule_name: FDR Chain Inflation from Custom Database
interactions.message: Database inflation (proteogenomics-db-search-inflation from proteogenomics-reviewer) combined with proteomics-fdr-global-only from proteomics-reviewer — actual variant-class FDR may be 3-5x nominal. See Nesvizhskii 2014 framework for class-specific FDR.

matched_findings.title: Search database 3.2x reference proteome — FDR impact unaddressed
Only PSM-level FDR applied — protein-level FDR absent

interactions.message: Spectral quality concern (mass-spec-spectral-quality) may invalidate proteomics identification findings. Verify spectral quality before trusting identification results.

matched_findings.title: Spectral quality critically degraded — 42% of spectra below S/N threshold
Only PSM-level FDR applied — protein-level FDR absent

interactions.rule_name: Missing Variant Normalization Cascading Through Pipeline
interactions.message: Missing variant normalization (genomics-reviewer) causes duplicate protein entries (proteogenomics-reviewer), inflating search database. Root cause is upstream, not in protein generation.

matched_findings.title: Variant normalization absent before VEP annotation
Identical protein sequences not deduplicated before database export

interactions.message: MBR-transferred identifications (proteomics-mbr-no-fdr) feeding into statistical testing. MBR-only proteins have no spectral evidence — differential expression results for these proteins are unreliable.

matched_findings.title: Match-Between-Runs enabled without FDR control for transferred identifications
No multiple testing correction applied in differential expression analysis

unmatched_findings.title: No hard filters or VQSR applied to raw variant callset
Duplicate marking absent from alignment pipeline
Mass accuracy drift detected: 8.7 ppm median error vs 1-2 ppm expected
NMD-susceptible truncated proteins included in search database
